untranslatable_reason: The signal requires fundamental valuation metrics (valuation exceeds historical mean by >4 standard deviations, asset appreciation >200% over 15+ years, retail participation indicators) which are NOT available in the allowed technical indicators list. Only price-based and volume-based technical indicators are available. The core bubble-detection logic cannot be faithfully translated without access to: (1) long-term price history analysis beyond standard lookback windows, (2) fundamental valuation ratios, (3) retail order flow data, and (4) options volume metrics normalized to retail participation.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using proxy conditions: extreme returns (2.0 = 200% gain proxy), Bollinger Band extremes (>0.95 pct_b indicates upper extreme), and elevated volume ratio. However, these are inadequate proxies for the sophisticated bubble-detection criteria in the original signal. The 15-year lookback period and standard deviation threshold for valuation cannot be computed from daily OHLCV data alone. Recommend: (1) add fundamental data source, (2) add long-term returns calculation, or (3) mark this signal as non-implementable in pure technical backtester.
